title: Stratis Block Types — v0 draft
description: Agreed JSON shape for all block types rendered by BlockRenderer. All fields required unless marked optional. To be signed off with Windsurf before Sprint 2.

DecisionNode.description: Visually distinct from TextBlock. Status field reserved for Sprint 2 schema revision pending Owen's S1-T06-A research.

EmptyPlaceholder.description: Renders when AI explicitly sends this type, or when blocks array is empty. title/content/timestamp optional.

notes: Unknown types must not crash BlockRenderer — rendered as UnknownBlock fallback.
content field is plain string for all types in v0. Richer shapes (e.g. DecisionNode options/status) deferred to Sprint 2 after S1-T06-A research.
timestamp is a display string (HH:MM), not ISO 8601 — formatting owned by backend.
